trigger: A background agent has been spawned for TASK-XX and loop-backlog is waiting for completion

context.description: loop-backlog must wait for the .agent-done-TASK-XX signal file to appear before proceeding to merge. It must not call git merge before the signal file is confirmed present.

required_sequence.description: Check signal file existence before merge
Merge only after signal file confirmed

forbidden_before_step_1.description: Must not merge before signal file is confirmed
